data.name: Claude Fable 5
data.description: Claude Fable 5 is Anthropic's most capable widely released model for demanding reasoning, long-horizon agentic work, code, and multimodal tasks. It features a 1M token context window, 128K max output tokens, always-on adaptive thinking, function calling, structured outputs, and vision support.

data.name: Claude Opus 4.8
data.description: Claude Opus 4.8 is Anthropic's most capable generally available model in the Opus family. It supports long-horizon agentic work, complex multi-step coding, and memory-driven tasks where coherence over extended sessions matters. It features a 1M token context window, 128K max output tokens, adaptive thinking, and strong multimodal capabilities.
